title: senecio subauritus
intro: Senecio subauritus, also known as Golden Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and coarse, hairy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio subauritus include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and promote sweating, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
